metadata.title: Alliance HQ
metadata.description: Alliance tools for Last War — built on ashed.online with video upload and more.
metadata.privacyDescription: How Alliance HQ handles your data and protects your Ashed connection key.

footer.attribution: Alliance HQ is a community wrapper for <link>ashed.online</link>. Alliance data credit belongs to Ashed.

nav.membersDescription: Live roster from Ashed for score matching
nav.videoUploadDescription: Extract scoreboard screenshots from a screen recording

admin.title: HQ Admin Portal
admin.subtitle: Cross-alliance observability for platform maintainers.
admin.systemDesc: Database status, resource counts, env config, and RBAC role catalog.
admin.alliancesDesc: HQ tenant rows synced from Ashed with owner and collaborator cache.
admin.commendationsDesc: Alliance Star podium types for video upload (when enabled).
admin.auditDesc: BFF and integration actions across all alliances.
admin.videoJobsDesc: Upload pipeline status, errors, and targets.
admin.usersDesc: View alliance roles and assign manual overrides.

usersPage.selectUser: Select a user to edit roles.
usersPage.editorHint: Manual assignments use source "manual" and are not overwritten by Ashed sync.
usersPage.assignHint: Create or replace a membership for this user on an alliance.

systemPage.bootstrapHint: Set PLATFORM_BOOTSTRAP_EMAIL in Vercel — the first connect from that email becomes platform maintainer when none exist yet.

videoJobsPage.actionUnavailable: Not available for this job status

auditPage.empty: No audit entries match these filters.

team.title: Team access
team.description: Roles synced from Ashed alliance owner and collaborators.
team.refreshFailed: Refresh failed — check your Ashed token.
team.ashedNote: To add or remove maintainers, update collaborators in Ashed → Alliances, then refresh here.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Alliance tools built on top of Ashed. Upload videos, manage scores, and jump to native Ashed pages from the sidebar.
dashboard.videoCardDescription: Drop a screen recording — we extract scoreboard frames and send them to Ashed.
dashboard.reportsCardDescription: Open the full Ashed reports dashboard in a new tab.
dashboard.aboutBody: This app extends <link>ashed.online</link> with alliance-specific tools. All core data and OCR processing remain on Ashed — we add convenience features the main app does not ship yet.

connect.title: Connect your Ashed account
connect.subtitle: Alliance HQ uses <link>ashed.online</link> for alliance data. You'll copy one network request as a cURL command — we handle the rest.
connect.noExpiryRead: Connected, but we couldn't read an expiry date from this token. We'll still notify you if Ashed stops accepting it.

embeddedLoginSuccess.title: Logging in to an embedded Ashed page
embeddedLoginSuccess.body: Use your email and Ashed password inside Alliance HQ — sign-in with Google is unavailable. Use 'Reset Password' if you don't have a password set.

login.title: Log into ashed.online
login.body: Open <link>ashed.online</link> in another tab and sign in with the same account you use for alliance data.
login.storageNote: Your connection key carries the same access as that logged-in browser tab. We store it encrypted on our server — not in your browser.

devtoolsNetwork.title: Open Network in DevTools
devtoolsNetwork.intro: With ashed.online still open, open your browser's developer tools and click the <network>Network</network> tab.
devtoolsNetwork.emptyListHint: If the request list is empty, refresh the page or open Reports. Optional: filter by base44.
devtoolsNetwork.screenshotAlt: Ashed alliances page with Chrome DevTools open on the Network tab, filtered by base44
devtoolsNetwork.screenshotCaption: Network tab selected, recording on, filter set to base44
devtoolsNetwork.checklist: Network tab is open and showing requests

embeddedLogin.title: Embedded Ashed login
embeddedLogin.checklist: I set an Ashed password (or I sign in with email already)

paste.title: Paste and connect
paste.intro: Paste your Copy as cURL command here (recommended). We also accept a Bearer token, authorization header line, or full connection string.
paste.alliancePickerHint: We load alliances where you are owner or collaborator on Ashed.
paste.allianceNone: No alliance admin access found on this Ashed account.
paste.allianceLoadFailed: Could not load alliances from Ashed.

copyMethod.easiestMethodBody: copy the whole request in one step — we pull out your login token automatically.
copyMethod.stepClickRequest: Click any request whose URL contains base44.app
copyMethod.stepRightClick: Right-click that request (or use the row menu)
copyMethod.stepCopyCurl: Choose Copy → Copy as cURL (Chrome, Edge, Brave, and Firefox; Safari includes this too)
copyMethod.curlBashHint: Some browsers label it Copy as cURL (bash) — either works. Paste the full command on the next step.
copyMethod.curlScreenshotAlt: Chrome DevTools Network tab with right-click menu open on a UserProfile request, Copy as cURL highlighted
copyMethod.curlScreenshotCaption: Right-click a base44 request → Copy → Copy as cURL
copyMethod.alternateAuthorization: Alternate: copy only the authorization header
copyMethod.authorizationIntro: Open the request's Headers tab and copy the authorization line (or just the long token after Bearer).
copyMethod.authorizationScreenshotAlt: Chrome DevTools Headers tab showing the authorization request header with Bearer token highlighted
copyMethod.authorizationScreenshotCaption: Headers tab → scroll to authorization and copy the full Bearer value
copyMethod.tryCurlInstead: Try copying as a cURL request instead

embeddedLogin.optionalBody: Skip this step if you already sign into ashed.online with email and password.
embeddedLogin.problemIntro: Alliance HQ embeds ashed.online inside the app. If you sign into Ashed with Google, Google blocks that login inside embedded pages — you may see a 403 error when the iframe asks you to sign in.
embeddedLogin.workaroundIntro: You can add a password to your Ashed account once. After that, use email + password for embedded pages in Alliance HQ. Your Google login still works when you open ashed.online directly.
embeddedLogin.stepForgotPassword: On ashed.online (same tab from step 1), open the login screen and choose Forgot password? Enter the email on your Ashed account.
embeddedLogin.stepResetEmail: Open the reset link from your email and choose a new password.
embeddedLogin.stepChoosePassword: Confirm the password is saved — you will use it inside Alliance HQ, not your Google account.
embeddedLogin.stepFirstEmbedLogin: After you connect below, the first embedded Ashed page may ask you to log in. Use email + password — do not click Sign in with Google.
embeddedLogin.googleStillWorksNote: This does not remove Google Sign-In from ashed.online when you visit it in its own tab.
embeddedLogin.checklistHint: Not required — use Skip if this does not apply to you.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Alliance HQ at alliance-hq.vercel.app is a community tool for Last War alliance officers. This page explains what we store and how we protect it.
privacy.noSellTitle: We do not sell your data
privacy.noSellBody1: Alliance HQ exists to help your alliance use ashed.online more easily. We will never sell, rent, or trade your personal information or alliance data to third parties. We do not use your data for advertising, and we do not build marketing profiles from your activity.
privacy.noSellBody2: We only use the information needed to run the service you asked for — for example, keeping you signed in and calling Ashed on your behalf when you use Alliance HQ features.

whatWeStoreItems.session: A random session identifier in an httpOnly cookie in your browser (not your Ashed login token).
whatWeStoreItems.token: Your Ashed connection key (JWT), encrypted on our server — see below.
whatWeStoreItems.metadata: Basic connection metadata, such as when your token expires and your reminder preferences.
whatWeStoreItems.label: An optional display label (for example, your Ashed account name) so we can show who is connected.

privacy.whatWeStoreFooter: Alliance reports, member lists, and other alliance content stay on Ashed's systems. Alliance HQ does not copy that data into a separate database for resale or unrelated purposes.
privacy.encryptionTitle: How your Ashed connection key is protected
privacy.encryptionIntro: When you connect Alliance HQ to ashed.online, you paste a network request that contains a login token (JWT). That token is the key that lets Alliance HQ talk to Ashed as you. We treat it like a password.

encryptionSteps.encrypted: Encrypted before storage. As soon as we receive your token, we encrypt it with AES-256-GCM (industry-standard authenticated encryption) before writing anything to our database.
encryptionSteps.separateKey: Separate encryption key. The key used to encrypt your token lives only in our server environment — it is never stored in the database alongside your encrypted token, and it is never sent to your browser.
encryptionSteps.uniqueIv: Unique ciphertext each time. Each encryption uses a fresh random value (IV), so even identical tokens would not produce identical stored data.
encryptionSteps.serverSide: Server-side only. Your browser receives a short-lived session cookie. The Ashed JWT itself stays on our server and is decrypted only when Alliance HQ needs to call Ashed for you.
encryptionSteps.disconnect: You can disconnect. Settings → Disconnect removes your stored connection key from our server.

privacy.whereDataBody: Alliance HQ runs on managed cloud hosting (Vercel for the app, Neon Postgres for encrypted credentials and session data). Data is transmitted over HTTPS.
privacy.questionsBody: This policy may be updated as Alliance HQ grows. If you have questions about your data, open an issue on our <githubLink>GitHub repository</githubLink>.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your Ashed connection and Alliance HQ preferences.
settings.allianceBody: Alliance HQ scopes member matching and score uploads to one alliance. We detect alliances where you are owner or collaborator on Ashed.
settings.alliancePickerHint: Role changes happen in Ashed → Alliances (owner or collaborators).
settings.allianceNone: No alliance admin access found on this Ashed account.
settings.allianceLoadFailed: Could not load alliances from Ashed.
settings.allianceSaved: Linked to {tag} ({name}). Re-run OCR on open video jobs if members were wrong.
settings.reminderOption: {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} before expiration
settings.reconnectHint: Reconnect to refresh your token and see its expiration date.
settings.disconnectBody: Clears your stored connection key from our server. You can reconnect anytime using the setup walkthrough.
settings.timezoneBody: Dates and times across Alliance HQ use your account time zone. Server Time (UTC−02:00) matches the in-game clock and is the default until you choose another zone.
settings.aboutBody: Alliance HQ at alliance-hq.vercel.app is a community wrapper for ashed.online. All alliance data credit belongs to Ashed.

tokenExpiry.logoutWarning: Logging out of ashed.online could break your Alliance HQ connection, even if your token has not reached its expiration yet.
tokenExpiry.connectedNotice: Your Ashed token is set to expire on <date></date>. We'll remind you <days></days> before it's time to get a fresh token.
tokenExpiry.reminderBanner: Your Ashed token expires on {date}. Copy a fresh cURL command from ashed.online to stay connected.
tokenExpiry.reconnectLink: Reconnect with a fresh cURL command

members.title: Members
members.subtitle: Roster synced from Ashed for your alliance tag. Use this to confirm video OCR and commendation matching see the right names.
members.missingTag: Set your alliance tag in Settings so we know which roster to load from Ashed.

video.title: Upload from video
video.subtitle: Record yourself scrolling a Last War leaderboard. We extract frames, OCR scores, and let you review before submitting to Ashed.
video.categoryLabel: What kind of scoreboard is this?
video.fileHint: MP4 or MOV screen recording while scrolling the full leaderboard. Requires ffmpeg on the server.

videoReview.title: Review extracted data
videoReview.noEntriesHint: OCR finished but no rows were parsed. This was usually a response-format bug — try re-running OCR.
videoReview.rematchingMembers: Updating member matches for your current alliance…
videoReview.scoreConflictHint: Some players were read with conflicting scores across video frames. Pick the correct score and delete the extra row for each player.
videoReview.scoreConflictRow: Conflicting scores — verify and delete the duplicate row.
videoReview.duplicateMemberTitle: Multiple rows map to the same member
videoReview.duplicateMemberHint: Each member can only have one score on this leaderboard. Check that the name and score are correct, then delete any duplicate or hallucinated row.
videoReview.duplicateMemberBlocked: Fix duplicate member rows before saving.

ashedEmbed.description: This page lives on Ashed. Open it below or in a new tab — your Alliance HQ sidebar stays here.
ashedEmbed.iframeHint: Embedded pages need a separate Ashed login. If you use Google Sign-In on ashed.online, log in here with email + password instead. If the frame stays blank, use "Open in Ashed" above.

devErrors.localDatabaseUrl: Set LOCAL_DATABASE_URL in .env.local (no ?schema=public — that is Prisma-only).
devErrors.tablesMissing: Tables missing — run npm run db:push against your local database.
devErrors.postgresUnreachable: Cannot reach Postgres — is the server running on localhost:5432?
devErrors.connectionPoolExhaustedHint: Postgres refused new connections (too many clients). Retry in a moment. If this persists, check Neon connection settings and reduce app pool size.
devErrors.schemaMigrationHint: The database schema is out of date (missing table or column). Redeploy so migrations run, or run npm run db:migrate against production.
devErrors.encryptionKeyMismatchHint: Stored Ashed credentials could not be decrypted — TOKEN_ENCRYPTION_KEY may have changed since connect. Disconnect and reconnect in Settings, or restore the original key.
devErrors.productionDetail: Something went wrong loading your session. Check Vercel runtime logs for details (search for app-layout). Postgres code: <pgCode></pgCode>.
devErrors.defaultHint: Set <localDb>LOCAL_DATABASE_URL</localDb> and <encKey>TOKEN_ENCRYPTION_KEY</encKey> in <envFile>.env.local</envFile>, then run <dbPush>npm run db:push</dbPush>.
